title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
